name: Stuffed Onions
recipeInstructions:
1. Hollow out the onions using a melon baller, leaving at least 2-3 layers of rings to support the filling.
2. Blanch the onion shells until softened for about 9-10 minutes.
3. Saute the onion pieces removed from about 2 onions in a little butter.
4. Mix the sauteed onion pieces with enough bread crumbs to glue or bond the mixture together, then add enough cream to keep the mixture moist.
5. Add cooked rice, salt, and pepper to taste.
6. Stuff the onion-rice mixture back into the onion shells.
7. Garnish with additional grated Swiss cheese and thyme.
8. Bake under moderate heat just to reheat and melt the cheese topping.
